CustomField.formula: IF ( ( Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '特高' ), '01' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '高圧受配電盤' ), '02' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '変圧器' ), '03' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) ='高圧コンビ'), '04' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '低圧・現場・ﾘﾚｰ・ACB盤' ), '05' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'コントロールセンタ（C/C)' ), '06' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '中継端子・接地端子盤' ), '07' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '回転数制御装置(VVVF)' ), '08' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'MACTUS' ), '09' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '計装機器' ), '10' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '中央監視' ), '11' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '発電機' ), '12' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = 'UPS(GS)' ), '13' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '共通機器' ), '51' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '技派・予備品等、他社' ), '61' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '本支社専用' ), '62' , IF ( (Quote__r.RecordType.Name = '水環境' && TEXT(MajorClassification__c) = '材料' ), '71' , ' ') ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 大分類コード（水環境）
